name: City Builder / Tycoon Starter
description: Grid-based isometric or top-down city builder. Building types: residential (population), commercial (income), industrial (resources), infrastructure (roads/power/water). Resource management: money, population, happiness, power. Building upgrades (3 levels). Income/expense cycle on timer. Zoning system. Camera pan+zoom. Adjacency bonuses for adjacent buildings.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project config with AutoLoads: ResourceManager (singleton tracking gold/population/power/water)

scenes/.city_map.tscn: Root Node2D with TileMap (grid-based, isometric or top-down), GridManager, CameraController, BudgetCycle timer, UI CanvasLayer
scenes/.buildings/residential.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (house icon), CollisionShape2D, BuildingBase script, population_capacity property, happiness_modifier
scenes/.buildings/commercial.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (shop icon), BuildingBase, income_per_cycle (gold), population_required (needs residents nearby for profit)
scenes/.buildings/industrial.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (factory icon), BuildingBase, resource_production (ore/wood/steel per cycle), pollution_radius
scenes/.buildings/road.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (road texture), BuildingBase, traffic_capacity, no collision, connects to adjacent roads
scenes/.buildings/power_plant.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (power tower), BuildingBase, power_output (units/cycle), fuel_cost, pollution_radius
scenes/.ui/build_menu.tscn: CanvasLayer with GridContainer of building type buttons (Residential/Commercial/Industrial/Road/Power), preview Sprite2D following cursor
scenes/.ui/resource_bar.tscn: CanvasLayer HBoxContainer showing: Gold ($X), Population (X/max), Happiness (X%), Power (X/max), Water (X/max)
scenes/.ui/building_info.tscn: CanvasLayer PanelContainer showing selected building stats: type, level (1-3), cost_to_upgrade, income/production, upkeep cost
scenes/.ui/budget_panel.tscn: CanvasLayer with income_display (this cycle's gold gain), expense_display (total upkeep), net_profit_display

scripts/.grid_manager.gd: Manages grid-based placement. TileMap property grid_size. Methods: is_placeable(grid_pos) checks if cell is empty and not water. get_adjacent_buildings(grid_pos) returns list of neighboring buildings. Place building: place_building(type, grid_pos) validates, deducts cost, instantiates, stores in buildings array. Signals: building_placed, building_removed
scripts/.building_base.gd: Base script for all buildings. Properties: building_type (string), level (1-3), grid_position, upkeep_cost (gold/cycle), population (if residential). Methods: upgrade() increases level, increases stats, increases upkeep. get_adjacency_bonus(adjacent_buildings_array) → bonus % (commercial gets +20% income per adjacent residential, industrial gets +10% pollution reduction per adjacent residential). Signals: upgraded, destroyed
scripts/.resource_manager.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Stores resources: gold (int), population (int), happiness (0-100), power (int), water (int). Methods: add_gold(amount), add_population(amount), add_power(amount), etc. Signals: resource_changed. Used by BudgetCycle to deduct/add amounts
scripts/.population_manager.gd: Tracks population by residential buildings. Methods: get_total_population() sums all residential capacities. get_population_limit() returns sum of all capacities. decrease_population_if_unhappy(happiness) → if happiness < 50, lose X% population. Signals: population_changed
scripts/.happiness_calculator.gd: Calculates city happiness (0-100). Factors: pollution from industry (negative), pollution from power plants (negative), parks nearby (positive +5 per adjacent), commercial income (positive +2 per gold profit). Formula: base 50 + (pollution_reduction) + (park_bonus) + (commercial_bonus). Updated per budget cycle
scripts/.budget_cycle.gd: Timer-based resource cycle. Every 10 seconds (1 'day'), collects: income from commercial buildings (including adjacency bonuses), production from industrial buildings, power from power plants, subtracts upkeep costs for all buildings. Updates ResourceManager totals. Checks population happiness → unhappiness loss
scripts/.camera_controller.gd: Handles camera pan and zoom. Methods: pan(input_direction) moves camera with arrow keys or WASD. zoom(delta) zooms with scroll wheel (0.5x to 4.0x). Constrains camera within map bounds
scripts/.zone_system.gd: Manages zoning overlay (residential/commercial/industrial zones). Displays zone preview on mouse hover. Methods: set_zone(grid_pos, zone_type), get_zone(grid_pos) → type. Provides visual feedback for zoned areas

assets/.tilesets/terrain.tres: TileSet with grass (empty), water (unbuildable), road texture, dirt
assets/.sprites/buildings/: Isometric or top-down icons: residential_house (level 1/2/3 variants), commercial_shop, industrial_factory, power_plant, road_segment
assets/.sprites/ui/: Building type icons for build menu, resource icons (gold coin, person icon, happiness face, power bolt, water drop)
assets/.sprites/zones/: Semi-transparent overlay textures for zoning preview (residential blue, commercial green, industrial orange)
assets/.fonts/: Default font for UI labels, monospace for currency display

preBuiltMechanics: Grid-based building placement with validation and cost deduction
Building types with unique functions: residential (population), commercial (income), industrial (resources/pollution), infrastructure (roads/power/water)
3-level upgrade system for buildings (increases stats and upkeep per level)
Adjacency bonus system: commercial gains income near residential, pollution reduced by parks
Resource management: gold, population, happiness, power, water
Timed budget cycle collecting income, production, deducting expenses every cycle
Build menu UI with preview on cursor
Real-time resource display bar and building info panel
customizationPoints: Add disaster system: earthquakes destroy buildings, floods affect water adjacent areas, fires spread
Implement traffic system: roads have capacity, congestion affects commercial efficiency
Create education buildings that boost population happiness and unlock advanced structures
Add parks and recreational zones for happiness/aesthetics
Implement pollution system with visual smog layer affecting health
Create tech tree unlocking new building types (solar, nuclear, hospitals)
Add citizen simulation with pathfinding and employment assignment
Implement seasonal events: holidays boost happiness, winter increases costs
Create trading system with neighboring cities
Add achievement system with milestone rewards
examplePrompts: Add disaster events: earthquakes destroy random buildings, fires need firefighter buildings to extinguish
Create a traffic simulation where roads have congestion limits affecting commercial buildings
Implement education buildings (schools, universities) that boost happiness and unlock advanced structures
Add parks that increase happiness in adjacent areas and reduce pollution
Create a water system with pipes and water towers required for residential buildings
Implement pollution mechanics with smog overlay affecting health/happiness
Add a tech tree unlocking buildings: solar panels, hospitals, sports stadiums
Create seasonal variations: winter increases heating costs, summer drives more commerce
Implement citizen AI that moves between residential and jobs (commercial/industrial)
Add crime system where lack of police buildings increases crime and happiness loss
